Our Party!   The prestigious FX Awards invite both British and international design talent from all over the world to enter the very best of interior products and projects. View 2025 Winners The 2025 FX Awards were an outstanding success, drawing an impressive turnout and generating a vibrant sense of celebration throughout the evening. On arrival, it was clear that the event had captured the attention and enthusiasm of the design market, creating an atmosphere that was energetic and vibrant, with the attendee’s expressing excitement at reconnecting with friends, colleagues and industry peers, and honouring this year’s standout achievements. Feedback from attendees has been overwhelmingly positive, with many praising not only the event’s organisation but also the quality of networking opportunities provided. Sponsors also commented that their exposure and engagement with this successful industry-leading event exceeded their expectations. The positive momentum generated by the FX Awards continues to resonate, leaving many attendees already looking ahead to the 2026 event!
